chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: Hello guys, my name is Nitesh and you are welcome to my YouTube channel. So we are continuing our deep learning playlist. In the last video, we learned how a neural network does prediction. And I also told you in the last video that we are slowly moving towards a very important topic whose name is backpropagation.

chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: Backpropagation is the algorithm by which neural networks learn. And it is said that learning and understanding that algorithm is a little difficult. So I don't want to make any mistake. I want to approach that topic very lovingly. And I think you can learn backpropagation better when you use it once before.

chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: So my plan is that in today's video and in the next two videos, I will run backpropagation on two real-world data sets in front of you. As in, I will train neural networks. We will use Keras library because it makes things very easy. And you will see firsthand how a neural network architecture is made,

chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: how it is trained and then how it is predicted. Not only that, I will also teach you how you can improve that neural network. I think if you see all these concepts practically once, then when we read backpropagation later, you can understand it a little better. So the plan is very simple.

chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: Today we will work on a classification data set. The data set I have chosen is called Customer Churn Prediction. It is a bank data set where customers are leaving the bank. And we have to look at the data and tell which customer will leave the bank in the future. Similarly, in the next video, we will do a different problem.

chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: There we will do a multi-class classification problem. Today's problem is binary classification 1-0. We will do a multi-class classification. And then in another video, we will approach a regression problem. The whole idea of these three videos is that I want you to be able to see what happens before reading backpropagation.

chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: Making a neural network, training it and predicting it. So that when you read these things, then you can connect dots and learn more correctly. So that's it for the introduction. Let's start the video. So guys this is the data set on which we will work.

chunks.title: Customer Churn Prediction using ANN | Keras and Tensorflow | Deep Learning Classification
chunks.text: This is a credit card customer churn prediction data set. So basically this is the data of a bank where they have stored the data of some of their customers. And this data tells whether their customers have left their bank or they are still customers. So machine learning is used a lot in churn prediction. Different companies make machine learning models for churn prediction.
